horror.description: Mods that add horror, fear, and suspense elements to Minecraft. Typically includes new monsters, dark atmospheres, and jump scares.

popularMods.name: Creeping Winter
popularMods.description: Adds chilling winter horror with new freeze-themed monsters

popularMods.name: The Midnight
popularMods.description: A horror dimension with terrifying creatures and dark biomes

popularMods.name: Scape and Run: Parasites
popularMods.description: Infected mobs mod with body horror elements

popularMods.name: Man from the Fog
popularMods.description: Adds a terrifying entity that stalks players in the fog

popularMods.name: Better Nether
popularMods.description: Dramatically expands the nether with horror-themed biomes

horror.notes: Horror packs work best with atmospheric mods like Dynamic Lights and Ambient Sounds for full immersion.

technology.description: Mods that add machines, automation, energy systems, and high-tech content.

popularMods.name: Create
popularMods.description: Mechanical contraptions, automation belts, and kinetic energy

popularMods.name: Applied Energistics 2
popularMods.description: Advanced item and energy storage networks

popularMods.name: Mekanism
popularMods.description: High-tech machines, power generation, and ore processing

popularMods.name: Thermal Expansion
popularMods.description: Classic tech mod with machines and energy conduits

popularMods.name: Industrial Craft 2
popularMods.description: The original tech mod with nuclear reactors

technology.notes: Technology mods often need a shared energy standard. Create uses Stress/RPM, while most others use Forge Energy or RF.

magic.description: Mods that add magic systems, spells, rituals, and mystical dimensions.

popularMods.name: Ars Nouveau
popularMods.description: Spell crafting system and magical automation

popularMods.name: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
popularMods.description: RPG-style spell system with skill trees

popularMods.name: Blue Skies
popularMods.description: Two magical dimensions with new biomes and items

popularMods.name: Botania
popularMods.description: Nature-themed magic using flowers and runes

popularMods.name: Bewitchment
popularMods.description: Witchcraft magic with cauldrons and familiars

optimization.description: Mods that improve game performance, reduce lag, and increase FPS without changing gameplay.

popularMods.name: Sodium
popularMods.description: The most impactful FPS mod for Fabric. Replaces the rendering engine.

popularMods.name: Lithium
popularMods.description: Server-side and general game logic optimizations

popularMods.name: FerriteCore
popularMods.description: Reduces memory (RAM) usage significantly

popularMods.name: ModernFix
popularMods.description: Startup time and general performance improvements

popularMods.name: ImmediatelyFast
popularMods.description: Optimizes immediate mode rendering

optimization.notes: Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore together are considered the standard optimization trio for Fabric. Sodium is Fabric-only. Embeddium is the Forge port of Sodium.

adventure.description: Mods that add new structures, dungeons, biomes, and exploration content.

popularMods.name: Dungeons and Taverns
popularMods.description: Many new dungeon and structure types

popularMods.name: Alex's Mobs
popularMods.description: Dozens of new animals and creatures

popularMods.name: When Dungeons Arise
popularMods.description: Large and impressive generated dungeons

popularMods.name: Terralith
popularMods.description: Dramatically improved world generation with new biomes

popularMods.name: Waystones
popularMods.description: Fast travel network via magical stones

survival.description: Mods that add depth to survival mechanics like seasons, temperature, hunger, and thirst.

popularMods.name: Serene Seasons
popularMods.description: Adds four seasons that affect biomes, crops, and gameplay

popularMods.name: Tough as Nails
popularMods.description: Temperature and thirst survival mechanics

popularMods.name: Farmer's Delight
popularMods.description: Expanded farming, cooking, and food variety

popularMods.name: Pam's HarvestCraft
popularMods.description: Huge variety of new crops and food items

decoration.description: Mods that add decorative blocks, furniture, and building options.

popularMods.name: Supplementaries
popularMods.description: Decorative blocks and functional utility items

popularMods.name: Chipped
popularMods.description: Hundreds of texture variants for vanilla blocks via a crafting table

popularMods.name: Macaw's Furniture
popularMods.description: Realistic furniture sets for building

popularMods.name: MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod
popularMods.description: Interactive furniture items
